title: 8th Angel 20 vs NGE
wikitext:
[]: 8th Angel 2.0 vs NGE [Spoilers] Post by Axell » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:44 pm So I rewatched episode 12 and I noticed something which I thought had been new in 2.0. In episode 12, 01 suffers major arm damage from just the impact/weight of Sahaquiel. The forearms actually explode out blood from the stress. Arguably the same level of damage if not more than what happens in 2.0, where most of the damage seems to come from the impaling of the arms. Also, looky semi berserker So it seems that not only is Rebuild Shinji less of a wuss, he's also much better at synching with 01. He suffers no physical damage in NGE, yet in 2.0 he has to wear bandages for a few days. Not only that but I think he has holes in his palms. So yea, go Shinji

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:01 pm I changed the topic title since not everybody watched the trailers. Anyway... Interesting observation, but I say part of this was done in 2.0 for the sake of dramatics, not necessarily that Shinji is any less wussy in Rebuild so far.

[]: Post by LiLi » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:05 pm Nice find! :) Took them 15 years to finally realize that holes in palms always make a good religious reference in this context... ;)

[]: Post by wonderluster » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:11 pm LiLi wrote: Nice find! :) Took them 15 years to finally realize that holes in palms always make a good religious reference in this context... ;)

[]: Post by schismatics » Fri Jul 31, 2009 9:05 pm I never even noticed the blood in the original episode. Good find.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 01, 2009 8:22 am Bleeding arm in episode 12 is old news to me. (Go fig, right?) I wouldn't read too deeply into the differences, Axell. Rebuild takes the whole "you are what happens to your Eva" element a step beyond what the majority of NGE showed, and the vicarious manifestations of damage are a regular occurrence now.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Aug 01, 2009 9:28 am I don't believe its "berserk" as much as the Eva just pushing up on the Angel.

[]: Post by Axell » Sat Aug 01, 2009 11:34 am Yea I guess I am reading a bit into it. One day I should just go through the series frame by frame. Still nice to share

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 01, 2009 7:57 pm I wouldn't read too deeply into the differences, Axell. Rebuild takes the whole "you are what happens to your Eva" element a step beyond what the majority of NGE showed, and the vicarious manifestations of damage are a regular occurrence now.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:07 am Mari seems to be an exception to many rules, I don't think she belongs in logical arguments just yet

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:47 am And what of Shinji?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:31 am wonderluster wrote: I think that you're not entirely correct on this statement.

[]: Post by Duskbyday » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:23 pm I feel 2.0 has a more religous feel in that battle, maybe with a bigger threat as Saaqy has drills now but something in the series picture seems more...grusome. I wish Eva was crucified in the original though

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:37 pm wonderluster wrote: And what of Shinji?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sun Aug 02, 2009 3:07 pm Nevahmind........

[]: Post by Fredrick2003 » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:48 pm I would actually prefer it if Shinji stayed a "wuss". Its what makes him HIM you know? I don't want him turned into a "no nonsense badass" character.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:00 pm That fight was more EPIC and entertaining then Ramiel vs. Shinji.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:02 pm Duskbyday wrote: I wish Eva was crucified in the original though

[]: Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:47 am Saha, pierced the palms of Unit 01 using what appeared to be a material that not only looked like the Lance of Longinus but happened to have the same abilities as the Lance as well. I mean, Shinji's up there holdin up a God knows how large Angel, so that must be a pretty powerful AT field, and then the "rag doll" as I like to call it, come out an sprouts lances. They instantly breach the AT field and into the palms.....Do so angels now have the ability to use makeshift LoL's?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2009 6:50 am The "Spear of Longinus" as we know it hasn't even AFAIK been verified for Rebuild (just weapons that look awfully like it), so at this point the speculation is moot.
